# QueryProgram — Instruction Grammar Reference

A `QueryProgram` is an ordered sequence of query instructions describing
what a view fetches and transforms, without executing side effects.

## Instruction Types

| Instruction | Action | Parameters | Effect |
|-------------|--------|-----------|--------|
| Scan | `scan` | source, bindAs | Read all records from source relation |
| Filter | `filter` | node (FilterNode JSON), bindAs | Keep only matching records |
| Sort | `sort` | keys (SortKey[] JSON), bindAs | Order records |
| Group | `group` | keys, config (aggregation), bindAs | Partition and aggregate |
| Project | `project` | fields (field[] JSON), bindAs | Select subset of fields |
| Limit | `limit` | count, output | Truncate to N records |
| Join | `join` | source, localField, foreignField, bindAs | Enrich via relation join |
| Pure | `pure` | variant, output | Seal program (terminal) |
| Compose | `compose` | first, second, bindAs | Monadic bind (chain) |

## FilterNode Types

```json
{ "type": "eq", "field": "kind", "value": "concept" }
{ "type": "neq", "field": "status", "value": "archived" }
{ "type": "gt", "field": "count", "value": 10 }
{ "type": "gte", "field": "count", "value": 10 }
{ "type": "lt", "field": "count", "value": 100 }
{ "type": "lte", "field": "count", "value": 100 }
{ "type": "contains", "field": "name", "value": "auth" }
{ "type": "in", "field": "status", "value": ["active", "draft"] }
{ "type": "exists", "field": "metadata.tags" }
{ "type": "and", "children": [ <FilterNode>, ... ] }
{ "type": "or", "children": [ <FilterNode>, ... ] }
{ "type": "not", "child": <FilterNode> }
{ "type": "true" }    // identity — matches everything
```

## SortKey Format

```json
[
  { "field": "name", "direction": "asc" },
  { "field": "updatedAt", "direction": "desc" }
]
```

Empty array `[]` = identity sort (preserves existing order).

## Pipeline Shapes

**Simple**: `scan → filter → sort → project → pure`

**With schema join**: `scan → join(membership) → filter → sort → project → pure`

**With grouping**: `scan → filter → group(aggregation) → sort → project → pure`

**Remote pushdown**: QueryProgram → `planPushdown` → API call + residual in-memory

**Composed**: `compose(programA, programB, bindAs)` — chain two programs

## View Suite Concepts

| Concept | Role |
|---------|------|
| DataSourceSpec | Declares where data comes from (concept-action, remote-api, search-index, inline) |
| FilterSpec | Named predicate trees with algebraic composition and normalization |
| SortSpec | Ordered sort keys with non-commutative composition |
| GroupSpec | Hierarchical grouping with aggregation and HAVING |
| ProjectionSpec | Field selection, formatting, computed fields, weights |
| PresentationSpec | Display type (table, card-grid, board, etc.) and hints |
| InteractionSpec | Row actions, bulk operations, user controls |
| ViewShell | Assembles all specs into a resolved view config |
| FilterRepresentation | Converts FilterNode IR ↔ UI formats (toggle-group, DSL, URL params) |
| QueryExecution | Dispatches programs to kernel/in-memory/remote/federated providers |
| RemoteQueryProvider | External API execution with pushdown optimization |

## Syncs

| Sync | Tier | What it does |
|------|------|-------------|
| view-resolve | required | Assembles specs into ViewShell |
| compose-filters | recommended | Composes FilterSpec predicates with FilterRepresentation |
| compile-query | optional | Builds QueryProgram from ViewShell |
| execute-query | optional | Dispatches QueryProgram to QueryExecution |
| filter-from-dsl | optional | Parses DSL string → FilterSpec |
| filter-to-dsl | optional | Serializes FilterSpec → DSL string |
| execute-remote-query | optional | Routes to RemoteQueryProvider |
| compile-remote-query | optional | Compiles for remote data sources |
